pages.raw_text:
Within 80 days, it is announced,
the o. r. & N. will begin leveling
the tract of land lying between
Mallon av. and the Great Northern
righto f way, extending from JEFF.
ferson st. on the west and to within
a few feet of Howard st. on the
east, at an expense of $4,000.
This tract is covered with many
rocky cliffs and mounds and is one
of the largest pieces of contract
work let in this city for years. 1t
is intended as a site for warehouses
and yards.


The o. r. & N. purchased this
strip of land last spring from D. p.
Jenkins. for $158,000.


The plans are completed and
provide for the construction of a
vast amount of trackage and sever
al large warehouses, each to be 600
feet long and 100 feet wide. ]. P.
